ab: Matawalay ako a miala ko tilid.
en: I forgot to bring the textbook.
I will share it with you.

ab: Matawalay ako a miala ko sasipasip.
en: I forgot to bring the eraser.
I can lend you.

ab: Matawalay iso a miala ko impic?
en: Do you forget to bring your pen?

ab: Hai, pacaliwen ho kako to impic iso makena?
en: Yes, can you lend me a pen?

ab: O maan ko kakaenen iso a sakalahok?
en: What would you like for lunch?
I want some bread.

ab: O maan ko kakaenen iso a sakalafi?
en: What would you like for dinner?
I want some rice.

ab: O maan ko nikaenan iso a sakaranam?
en: What did you have for breakfast?
I ate an egg.

ab: O maan ko nikaenan iso a sakalahok?
en: What did you have for lunch?
I ate the chicken.
Let’s play soccer.

ab: ’Ayaw to kiso, sawni to kako tayra mikilim tisowanan.
ch: B:你先去，我等一下去找你。
en: You go first and I will catch up later.
Let’s go swimming.
Sure! Let’s go there together.
Let’s play ball.

ab: Aka ho, micolo’ ho kita to tilid.
en: No, we have to carry books first.

ab: Misolacay to kiso to wadis haw?
en: Did you brush your teeth?

ab: Cowa ho, mifanaway ho kako to kaysing no hatini.
en: Not yet. I am doing the dishes.

ab: Mioraoray to kiso to ngoyos haw?
en: Did you rinse out your mouth?
Yes, I rinsed out my mouth.

ab: Mifanaway to kiso to kaysing haw?
en: Did you wash the dishes?

ab: Maharekay to kako a mifanaw to kaysing.
en: I already washed the dishes.

ab: Mana ca pisawsaw kiso to kamay?
en: Why didn’t you wash your hands?
I will wash my hands later.
What were you doing just now?
I went to meet the teacher.
What are you going to do after school?
I will go home directly.
What is she doing after school?
She is going to go dancing.
